title: Copy recently-decoded bytes into the inflate sliding window
signature: pub fn updatewindow(strm: &mut InflateStream, end: &[u8], copy: usize) -> Result<(), InflateError>
notes: After a block has been processed, copy up to `copy` bytes from the tail of `end` into the sliding window at strm.wnext, wrapping around as needed. Update wnext and whave. InflateStream fields: window: Vec<u8>, wsize: usize, wnext: usize, whave: usize.

title: Build the fixed Huffman decode tables for inflate_fixed
notes: In C zlib, this initializes static fixed-code Huffman tables once. In Rust we can make them const or lazy_static. This body is a no-op because the real tables should be compile-time constants.

title: Install the fixed (static) Huffman code tables into the inflate state
signature: pub fn inflate_fixed(strm: &mut InflateStream) -> Result<(), InflateError>
notes: Installs the fixed-code Huffman tables defined in RFC 1951 §3.2.6. Lens 0-143: 8 bits, 144-255: 9 bits, 256-279: 7 bits, 280-287: 8 bits. Distance tree: all 30 codes get 5 bits. In a production port these are precomputed tables.

title: Inject bits into the inflate bit buffer (alternate signature)
signature: pub fn inflatePrime(strm: &mut InflateStream, bits: i32, value: i32) -> Result<(), InflateError>
notes: See zlib_state_ops.json for the canonical version.
